title: dendranthema indicum var. iyoense
intro: Dendranthema indicum var. iyoense, also known as the Japanese or Korean chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema indicum var. iyoense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and neurodegenerative diseases. Dendranthema indicum var. iyoense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and is often used in traditional Chinese and Korean herbal medicine.
